name: Chicken and Sausage in Tomato Sauce
recipeIngredient: 4 each Large Cloves Garlic, Coarsely Chopped
1 x Salt and Pepper to Taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large heavy skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the garlic and sauté until light golden brown.
3. Remove the garlic and set aside.
4. Prick the sausage links several times with a fork, then sear them in the hot oil.
5. Remove the sausage and set aside, covered.
6. Brown the chicken pieces well on all sides in the same skillet.
7. Remove the chicken and set aside, covered.
8. Pour 1 tablespoon of the drippings into a large Dutch oven or casserole dish. Discard the remaining drippings for another use (do not wash the skillet).
9. Crush the tomatoes by hand with a spoon, then add them along with their juice to the Dutch oven.
10. Add tomato paste, salt, freshly ground pepper, basil, and reserved garlic. Stir well.
11. Simmer uncovered for 15 minutes.
12. Add the sausage pieces, return lid, and simmer covered for an additional 20 minutes.
13. Add the chicken thighs and legs, cover, and simmer for another 20 minutes.
14. Deglaze the skillet with red wine by pouring it over the sauce in the Dutch oven.
15. Stir to incorporate and simmer for a final 10 minutes.
16. Sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley before serving over pasta topped with freshly grated Parmesan cheese.
